title: Spicy Chorizo Kebabs
description: A flavorful and spicy kebab recipe made with chorizo sausage, perfect for a quick and easy dinner. Serve with your favorite sides, such as rice or vegetables.
instructions: 2. In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, and Syrian oregano.
3. Add sliced chorizo, bell peppers, and onion to the bowl, and toss to coat with the marinade.
4. Thread the marinated ingredients onto skewers.
5. Grill the kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the chorizo is cooked through.
6. During the last 2 minutes of cooking, top each kebab with crumbled halloumi cheese.
7. Remove the kebabs from the grill, and let them rest for a few minutes before serving.
